reasoning: EMOTIONAL (60%): Bright saturated cyan/teal blade with warm orange-gold crossguard nails the Hyrule palette — saturated blues and warm accent yellows squarely in the friendly Zelda color vocabulary. The overall read is heroic-toy, not grim; silhouette is clean and approachable for a sword prop. Charming, not threatening. Score ~8/10. TECHNICAL (40%): 1px hard outlines visible cleanly at all zoom levels, no anti-aliasing bleed. Blade uses 2-3 hard tones (highlight strip, mid cyan, dark edge) — proper hard shading. Pixels are grid-snapped; the diagonal staircase is clean. Compares well to Denzi peer reference for clean silhouette and outline discipline, even though Denzi palette is more muted. Minor issue: the crossguard detail at native/1x is quite small and slightly hard to parse, but readable at 2x. Combined weighted: 0.6*8 + 0.4*8 = 8.0.
